WARNING - 18+ LYRICS!

And two left feet, you know I always drop

I'm the whole damn cake and the cherry on top
Shook up the bottle, made a good girl pop
▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬ஜ۩۞۩ஜ▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬▬

Thank you to Asphyxia, Cubbby, jas, C00L, Shmiklak, Gero, schoolboy and DigiDrake for the guest difficulties!

related_tags.name: skillset/alt
related_tags.description: Colloquial term for maps which use rhythms that encourage the player to alternate notes. Typically distinct from burst or stream maps.

related_tags.name: skillset/jumps
related_tags.description: Focuses heavily on jumps, i.e. circles spaced far apart that require the player to move towards, slow down to hit, then speed up to move towards the next object.

related_tags.name: jumps/sharp
related_tags.description: Patterns with heavy use of sharp angle movement.

related_tags.name: tech/slider tech
related_tags.description: Tests uncommon skills involving sliders, such as heavy use of kicksliders or aim on complex slidershapes.
